subcodes.first_line: The Book which God hath sent down from the heaven of His Will as a bounty unto all created things. Blessed is the soul that layeth fast hold upon it, despite those who cast it behind their backs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الله من سمآء المشیه فضلا علی البریه ظوبی لنفس اخذه رغما للذین نبذوه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @personal instructions
